intro: Calonemorchis plicata, also known as the folded Calonema, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Indonesia, where it is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. The bioactive constituents of Calonemorchis plicata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, such as calonemorine and calonemoxine, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Calonemorchis plicata is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and is also used in the form of capsules or tablets.
